intimacy.note: Confirmed patterns from 'example intimacy' (in-game console tokens do NOT appear to be order-sensitive): two-char start = 'sexualact intimacy {char1} {char2} {event}'; single-char start = 'sexualact {char1} {event} intimacy'; end = 'sexualact intimacy {char1} end'; action speed = 'intimacy {char1} {increaseactionspeed|decreaseactionspeed}'. The 'reset' subcommand has NO confirmed example - its command below is a best-guess by analogy to action speed, unverified.

achievements.name: Social Butterfly
achievements.description: Meet all of the characters at the party in one playthrough.

achievements.name: Ashley
achievements.description: Complete Ashley's story by helping her prank her sister!

achievements.name: Drunk and Disorderly: Ashley
achievements.description: Get Ashley drunk and on a path of destruction!

achievements.name: Smooth Operator: Ashley
achievements.description: Smooth talk your way into Ashley's affection without completing her main storyline.

achievements.name: Rachael
achievements.description: Complete Rachael's storyline and win her affection.

achievements.name: Katherine
achievements.description: Complete Katherine's main storyline and help her get back at her boyfriend.

achievements.name: Newcomer: Vickie
achievements.description: Get Vickie Vixen to show up at the party.

achievements.name: Vickie
achievements.description: Complete Vickie's main storyline for a "hot" ending.

achievements.name: Amy: Scavenger Hunt
achievements.description: Complete Amy's Scavenger Hunt path.

achievements.name: Amy
achievements.description: Complete Amy's main storyline and win her affection.

achievements.name: Duck n' Weave
achievements.description: Avoid Frank AND Derek's fists at the same time for at least 60 seconds. (No locking doors!)

achievements.name: First Impressions
achievements.description: Strip at the door and make your first impression to every party goer in the nude. (Vickie Not Needed)

achievements.name: Ice Bath
achievements.description: Get on the "shit list" of every guest of the opposite sex at the party. (Guests you have to invite not included.)

achievements.name: Inspector
achievements.description: Inspect at least 30 items in one playthrough.

achievements.name: Smooth Operator: Madison
achievements.description: Sweet talk your way into unlocking the special social ability of the vaunted dumpster raccoon.

achievements.name: Drunk and Disorderly: Madison
achievements.description: Give Madison a few and see what happens when she takes on the persona of her favorite reality TV star.

achievements.name: Drunk and Disorderly: Stephanie
achievements.description: Give Steph some liquid courage and find out what she REALLY thinks of her boss!

achievements.name: Stephanie
achievements.description: Say no to milk, drink school, and help Stephanie discover her true calling in life.

achievements.name: The Muse: Madison
achievements.description: Show off your artistic skills and ruin a friendship to get a reward from Madison!

achievements.name: The Muse: Derek
achievements.description: Take the high road by not sleeping with Madison and experience the wonders of friendship with Derek.

achievements.name: Rule 34
achievements.description: Yeah I mean...you can, but why would you?

achievements.name: Howz It Goin Dood
achievements.description: Experience a magical, non-violent, artistic moment with Frank.

achievements.name: Relentless
achievements.description: Outside of "Derek Smash!", get Patrick beaten up 5 times in one playthrough.

achievements.name: Do You Smell Blood?
achievements.description: Give Frank a concussion, then take advantage of the situation and free the booze!

achievements.name: Caught in the Act
achievements.description: Get caught by another character in the middle of some sexy time!

achievements.name: Party Pooper
achievements.description: Experience a better life through chemistry, and shed six pounds at the same time! Thanks Laxapas!

achievements.name: The Brahdyssey
achievements.description: Politely listen to all of Patrick's epic backstory.

achievements.name: I'll Be Back
achievements.description: Unlock CompuBrah, learn about Patrick's businesses, and maybe, just maybe stop a Skynet situation from playing out.

achievements.name: If at First You Don't Succeed...
achievements.description: Throw a dildo at it. Obviously. Do we have to tell you everything?

achievements.name: Benedict Brahrnold
achievements.description: Give Patrick Rachael's death mix and do what it takes to shut down his site!

achievements.name: A Striking Resemblance
achievements.description: Get to the bottom of Patrick and Rachael's drama, and help Pat win her over!

achievements.name: Notice Me, Sensei
achievements.description: Provide a little inspiration, a bit of fitness guidance, and a nutritional treat to increase Leah's power level.

achievements.name: La Coochadora
achievements.description: Stoke the fires of rivalry within Brittney by giving her an extremely fishy gift.

achievements.name: Derezzed
achievements.description: They're smarter than they look! Experience the Easter Egg ending of Lety's content.

achievements.name: Te Amo Lety
achievements.description: Complete the Opportunity "Vida La Lety".

achievements.name: The Elder Brahs
achievements.description: Reverse pickpocket an item into Patrick's pants during "Disrupt the Disruptor".

achievements.name: Simple Geometry
achievements.description: Successfully interrupt Leah and Lety's conversation with a popper, from very long range.

achievements.name: The Harder They Fall...Dood
achievements.description: Defeat Frank 1-on-1 without any sparring or combat training.

achievements.name: The Bride
achievements.description: Help Leah bring the serpent to a swift end, and reap the rewards...

achievements.name: Ronin
achievements.description: Convince Leah to abandon her lawful ways...and survive!

achievements.name: Sucker Punch
achievements.description: Punch Frank, Derek, and Patrick when they're not looking and not in combat, all in one playthrough.

achievements.name: Money Shot
achievements.description: Peg Frank with a sex toy while he is dancing on the roof. Not peg...hit. You get it.

achievements.name: I Know Grump-Fu
achievements.description: Help the Game Grumps leave the party using the magic of virtual reality!

achievements.name: Do Not Burn
achievements.description: Do the opposite of this, and get the Game Grumps onto their noble steeds! Yeehaw, and stuff.

achievements.name: IRL Let's Player
achievements.description: Watch the Game Grumps cause a scene 8 times in one playthrough. Don't forget to subscribe, thumbs up, rate me, updoot, etc.

achievements.name: D-Club Certified
achievements.description: Get Frank to join the D-Club.

achievements.name: Casanova
achievements.description: Reach a...climactic moment with four ladies in one playthrough.

achievements.name: Casabrova
achievements.description: Reach a...climactic moment with two men in one playthrough.

achievements.name: Good Ol' Days
achievements.description: Complete "Memory Lane" and convince Derek you take your past as seriously as he does.

achievements.name: Snapped
achievements.description: Uncover the fate of Purgalicious and present the evidence to Derek.

achievements.name: Beyond the Call of Dude-y
achievements.description: Really give Frank something to cherish...for instance, a fully naked picture of Katherine.

achievements.name: Good Riddance!
achievements.description: Crush Frank's self-esteem and his notions about manhood to the point where he can't take it anymore! Buh bye, dude!

achievements.name: Against All Odds
achievements.description: For once, make love, not war with Frank.

achievements.name: Now It's a Party!
achievements.description: Liven up the scenery by getting three or more partygoers to enjoy the rest of the night while showing varying amounts of skin.

achievements.name: The Magic Number
achievements.description: Cumplete Vickie's "Good Guests Gone Bad" Opportunity with Vickie and another lover.

achievements.name: A Friend in Need...
achievements.description: Help your gal pal Brittney out by fulfilling her request for a spare shirt.

achievements.name: The Crush
achievements.description: Get Brittney to realize who would really make her happy. Then, play wingwoman and help her score!

achievements.name: The Crush(es)
achievements.description: Get Brittney to realize who would really make her happy. Then, see if she'll share a little bit of that pleasure with you.

achievements.name: Host Hijinks
achievements.description: Help Derek get back at Madison for subjecting him to all her mind games.

achievements.name: Hijinks Averted
achievements.description: Help Derek take the higher path, and instead of getting revenge on Madison, make a more wholesome choice.

achievements.name: Love Conquers All
achievements.description: Can you give more to Brittney than just a boring old shirt? Take your relationship to new heights and find out!

achievements.name: Congrats, A Celebrity Hates You
achievements.description: Fail the Doja Cat DLC before you even get her to the party.

achievements.name: That's a Nice Bush!
achievements.description: Catch drunk Amala red-handed with some hedge trimmers.

achievements.name: Doja's Dope-Ass Dinolicious Danceapalooza
achievements.description: Successfully pull off one of the greatest backyard concerts ever.

achievements.name: Hungry Hungry Hot Tubs
achievements.description: Accidentally make Doja Cat go for a swim.

achievements.name: It Smells Like Roses
achievements.description: Listen to the soothing sounds of nature, directly from Doja Cat.

achievements.name: Life Found a Way
achievements.description: You were so preoccupied with whether or not you could, you didn't stop to think if you should... be wasting time with this.

achievements.name: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
achievements.description: Get all the party guests involved in a snowball fight.

achievements.name: Deck the Balls
achievements.description: Make the holidays merrier by hanging Nana's special mistletoe.

achievements.name: It's an Older Code, But It Checks Out
achievements.description: Successfully unlock Brahd Mode on Compubrah.

achievements.name: Release the Kraken
achievements.description: Share a few drinks with Liz Katz and become a third wheel in your own adventure.

achievements.name: Elementary, My Dear Player
achievements.description: Solve the most convoluted Murder Mystery of all time.

achievements.name: That's Not How You Get Ahead
achievements.description: Discover the consequences of overheating.

achievements.name: Mask of Virility
achievements.description: Get interrupted three times with Liz Katz and then let her get her claws in you.

achievements.name: Stop It Step Bro
achievements.description: Rescue Liz Katz from the dryer of doom in the most romantic way possible.

achievements.name: Dumbest Player Achievement
achievements.description: Really? You couldn't figure it out even with the hint? Is that your fault or ours?

achievements.name: Dancing for Gold Coins
achievements.description: Fulfill every WoW player's fantasy and have Liz Katz cosplay as an elf.

achievements.name: Solar Flare
achievements.description: Help Derek's dancing burn brighter than the sun and then help protect his dignity... sort of.

achievements.name: A Display of Affection
achievements.description: Choose the right person to share a valentine gift with for an Easter Egg!

achievements.name: Job Well Done
achievements.description: Help Derek land the job of his dreams - which is any job. The economy is rough, people.

achievements.name: Laying Some Pipe
achievements.description: Successfully repair a leaky pipe and a sisterly relationship. Only one repair will last, though!

achievements.name: One Is the Loneliest Number
achievements.description: Be too afraid to talk to girls.

achievements.name: The Future Is Ads
achievements.description: Have Derek's handyman lesson get interrupted by an ad.

achievements.name: The Greatest Trip of Her Life
achievements.description: Give Madison the Babs Special and see her trip through to its conclusion.

achievements.name: One Man Army
achievements.description: Use the power of Nano-Nuts to fight your way back to the hot tub.

achievements.name: Meat's Back on the Menu
achievements.description: Reawaken a wasteland warrior through the scent of burning flesh.

achievements.name: Nocturnal Temptations
achievements.description: Travel back in time and complete the filming of Nocturnal Temptations.

achievements.name: The Future Is Ads 2
achievements.description: Get interrupted by an ad while listening to Down the Mystery Hole.

achievements.name: Toga! Toga!
achievements.description: Find and wear a hillbilly's bedsheets. Just don't look too closely at the stains.

achievements.name: Some People Just Want to Watch the World Burn
achievements.description: Immortalize tiny Patrick on film by giving him the spotlight with Gisella.

achievements.name: Some People Just Want to Watch Girls Kiss
achievements.description: Make Vickie's dreams come true by giving her the spotlight with Gisella.
